text: Moving through these spaces, I sense a curious blend of anticipation and reflection. The quiet of the meeting room, with people in discussion behind glass, gives me a feeling of contemplation—so much potential hidden in quiet conversations. The vibrant R+D wall feels energizing—creative thoughts and innovations swirl around. Here, the future seems to whisper through both silence and color. I feel small and thoughtful, a witness to human ingenuity at work.
